objective: GaugeAnything as a promptable physical measurement layer across industrial visual tasks.

status_legend.official: Audited result exists and is suitable for headline use with stated caveats.
status_legend.partial: Pipeline/result exists but has a known gate, coverage, or protocol limitation.
status_legend.negative: Audited negative result that defines a real bottleneck.
status_legend.next: Dataset path and metric target are identified; adapter/eval is the next sprint item.
status_legend.candidate: Useful coverage expansion, but download/license/protocol still needs work.

entries.gt_mechanism: pixel mask; width is measured from mask geometry
entries.headline: SAM3 crack mIoU 0.442 vs adaptive 0.181, but width relative error remains 62.9%.
entries.caveat: Pixel-mask GT is not physical mm; segmentation rank is not measurement rank.
entries.next_step: Use source/category holdout to train measurement-aware gates, not just IoU heads.

entries.headline: GaugeProfile+cal 27.8±2.5um 5-fold; signal-width path 39.9um MAE / 23.2um median where localized.
entries.caveat: Profile-level and localization-gated results are not yet full image-level promptable coverage.
entries.next_step: Expand image-level krkCMd subset and report coverage/error jointly.

entries.unit: px now, mm when scale exists
entries.headline: Metal-tile blowhole prompt maps to blob measurement; mIoU 0.429 and diameter 11.6px.
entries.caveat: Needs physical scale or known part dimensions for mm claim.
entries.next_step: Pair surface defects with SmartDoc/marker scale or factory part specs.

entries.quantity: soft boundary alpha and affected area
entries.gt_mechanism: pixel mask plus synthetic alpha supervision
entries.headline: Directional matting v2 reaches 0.949 real-fray mask IoU vs guided matte 0.860.
entries.caveat: Real alpha GT is unavailable; evaluation is mask preservation/transfer, not true alpha.
entries.next_step: Collect or synthesize directional fray with calibrated alpha-like edge labels.

entries.gt_mechanism: pixel defect masks evaluated as ranking AUC
entries.headline: Binary SAM3 is chance-like on uneven; illumination residual reaches 0.669 test AUC.
entries.caveat: Severity units are image-field statistics, not yet calibrated to factory tolerances.
entries.next_step: Add calibrated panels or synthetic low-frequency defects with known amplitude.

entries.gt_mechanism: legal coin diameters; leave-one-out same-denomination scale
entries.headline: 22 real-photo scenes: mean/median relative error 1.74% / 1.68%, pass@5% 100%.
entries.caveat: Known-object consistency, not absolute marker calibration.
entries.next_step: Add cards/documents/signs as other known-size scale families.

entries.headline: T-LESS SAM3 masks match GT objects at 100%; median dimension error 2.5%.
entries.caveat: Studio-like BOP setting; object classes are limited and textureless.
entries.next_step: Add HB/YCB-V/ITODD for broader object families and category holdout.

entries.headline: Global SAM3 MAE 13.2; SAHI tiled improves to MAE 7.35 but dense touching bars remain open.
entries.caveat: Prompt tuning is insufficient; density/centroid fallback or supervision is needed.
entries.next_step: Train a small centroid/density head and evaluate dense bins separately.

entries.headline: Gated handheld RGB-D gives 1.06% median / 2.60% p90 relative error over 160 frames.
entries.caveat: Coverage cost is real; gate rejects roughly half of candidate frames.
entries.next_step: Add EuRoC blur ladder and SmartDoc video scale stress test.

entries.gt_mechanism: RGB-D + object pose/dimensions; oracle volume gate
entries.headline: ADT oracle multiview depth: 8.7% median over 2 seq/480 frames/229 objects; 0.5m/s+ is 9.1%.
entries.caveat: Oracle GT-volume gate; ROI-only negative control collapses to 316%.
entries.next_step: Replace oracle gate with SAM3/segmentation gate and report gate failure rate.

entries.headline: P2-1b promptable detected quad: SAM3 'document' prompt reaches gate pass 96%, quad IoU 0.968, edge rel err median 1.5% (vs naive 10-17%); tail remains heavy (p90 27-32%).
entries.caveat: Median is promptable and real; the p90 tail (14-32% depending on prompt) means a per-frame quality gate is still required before field claims. MIDV-500 not yet run.
entries.next_step: Add per-frame quality gate to cut the p90 tail; evaluate MIDV-500 ID-card scale.

entries.gt_mechanism: tray homography or provided length labels
entries.headline: Next adapter: non-industrial but physical length shows GaugeAnything beyond rigid parts.
entries.caveat: Domain is biological; useful as physical-AI coverage, not core industrial proof.
entries.next_step: Add length-regression adapter with segmentation/exemplar gate.

entries.headline: Next adapter: count/density family outside rebar, less touching and more natural clutter.
entries.caveat: Scale may be absent; count result is first target.
entries.next_step: Implement log instance count adapter and compare SAM3 global vs tiled.

entries.headline: Candidate adapter: outdoor moving-camera known-object metric sanity check.
entries.caveat: Sign category extraction and diameter standard matching need validation.
entries.next_step: Filter round signs, snap to standard diameters, report outdoor dynamic error.

entries.headline: Bearing cross-source collapses even for physics features; N-CMAPSS RUL anchors physical-state framing.
entries.caveat: Outside image-only GaugeAnything; belongs to broader Industrial/Physical AI framing.
entries.next_step: Keep as motivation appendix, not main visual benchmark.
